scale.label: text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-heading font-bold text-[#666661]

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Single column conversational interface mimicking LLMs, centered, generous padding to feel like a premium editorial tool rather than a crammed dashboard.
spacing_and_layout.container: max-w-4xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 w-full h-screen flex flex-col
spacing_and_layout.input_area: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 p-6 bg-gradient-to-t from-[#F5F5F0] via-[#F5F5F0] to-transparent pointer-events-none

header.description: Minimal top bar. Contains brand name left, and 'How it works' trigger right.
header.styles: fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 h-16 flex items-center justify-between px-6 z-40 backdrop-blur-md bg-[#F5F5F0]/80 border-b border-[#E5E5DF]

input_bar.description: Prominent chat input at the bottom. Floats above the background. pointer-events-auto inside the container.
input_bar.styles: max-w-3xl mx-auto bg-white border border-[#E5E5DF] shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] rounded-2xl p-4 flex flex-col gap-3 transition-all

anatomy.top_row: Flex container for Pattern Picker chips and Model Selector. Scrollable horizontally if needed.
anatomy.bottom_row: Textarea (auto-growing, max height 200px) + Action Buttons (Advanced Settings Trigger, Generate Button)

pattern_picker.description: Chips/thumbnails to select visual pattern before generation.
pattern_picker.chip_unselected: h-8 px-3 rounded-full border border-[#E5E5DF] text-xs font-heading font-medium text-[#666661] hover:border-[#111111] hover:text-[#111111] transition-colors cursor-pointer flex items-center gap-1.5
pattern_picker.chip_selected: h-8 px-3 rounded-full border border-[#111111] bg-[#111111] text-white text-xs font-heading font-medium transition-colors cursor-pointer flex items-center gap-1.5

model_selector.description: Unobtrusive select dropdown (Shadcn Select) for model choice (gpt2, opt, etc).
model_selector.styles: h-8 border-none bg-transparent hover:bg-[#F5F5F0] text-xs font-mono text-[#666661]

advanced_drawer.description: Collapsible settings panel triggered from input bar. Use Shadcn Popover or Collapsible.
advanced_drawer.content: Sliders and inputs for secret key, gamma, delta, tau, temperature, top_p.
advanced_drawer.styles: bg-white border border-[#E5E5DF] shadow-xl p-6 rounded-xl space-y-4 w-80 z-50
advanced_drawer.input_style: h-9 bg-[#F5F5F0] border-none rounded-md font-mono text-sm px-3 w-full

message_bubbles.user: bg-[#F5F5F0] border border-[#E5E5DF] text-[#111111] rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm p-4 max-w-[80%] ml-auto font-body
message_bubbles.assistant: bg-white border border-[#E5E5DF] text-[#111111] rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm p-5 max-w-[90%] mr-auto font-body shadow-sm space-y-4

metric_pills.description: Small pills attached to the assistant message showing generation metadata.
metric_pills.styles: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-1 rounded bg-[#F5F5F0] border border-[#E5E5DF] text-[10px] font-mono text-[#666661] uppercase gap-1 mr-2 mb-2

verify_action.styles: mt-2 inline-flex items-center px-4 py-2 bg-white border border-[#111111] text-[#111111] text-xs font-heading font-bold uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-[#111111] hover:text-white transition-colors cursor-pointer

verdict_card.description: Appears after verification. Contains Verdict Chip, Z-Score, LCS Ratio, and Visualizations.
verdict_card.styles: mt-4 p-5 bg-[#F5F5F0] border border-[#E5E5DF] rounded-xl flex flex-col gap-6

verdict_chip.positive: inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1.5 bg-[#10B981]/10 border border-[#10B981]/20 text-[#10B981] font-mono text-sm font-bold rounded-full
verdict_chip.negative: inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1.5 bg-[#EF4444]/10 border border-[#EF4444]/20 text-[#EF4444] font-mono text-sm font-bold rounded-full

side_by_side_visualizer.css_grid: display: grid; gap: 1px; background-color: #E5E5DF; border: 1px solid #E5E5DF; padding: 1px; width: fit-content

how_it_works_panel.description: Slide-in panel (Shadcn Sheet) replacing old 'about' tab.
how_it_works_panel.styles: bg-white w-full sm:w-[400px] border-l border-[#E5E5DF] p-6 space-y-6 overflow-y-auto

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All buttons and interactive chips must have distinct hover states, specifically border color changes or background inversions.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use 'transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out' for standard interactions.
motion_and_interactions.chat_appearance: New messages should slide up and fade in using framer-motion (y: 10, opacity: 0 -> y: 0, opacity: 1).
motion_and_interactions.visualizer_reveal: The target vs recovered grids should stagger their cell appearance for a dramatic 'decoding' effect.

testing_attributes.rules: All interactive elements must include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case representing their role.

file_extensions.frontend: Use .js and .jsx only (no .ts or .tsx). Implement Shadcn components in .js.

instructions_to_main_agent: Initialize Tailwind config with the specified color tokens and font families.
Include the Fontshare and Google Fonts imports in index.css.
Build the UI as a single-page chat interface. Remove any tabbed navigation.
Use standard HTML/Tailwind for the message layout, but utilize Shadcn for Select, Popover (Advanced Settings), Sheet (How it works), and Slider.
Ensure the visual watermark pattern grids map directly to the green/red/white semantic colors defined.
Follow the mobile-first layout strategy, ensuring the input bar remains sticky at the bottom on all screen sizes.
Inject the 'testing_attributes' exactly as specified into the JSX.
